anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1126: Final Saga Reveals Shanks' Twin Brother
anime_pulse_items.summary: In the latest chapter, Oda drops a bombshell: Shanks has a long-lost twin brother who is a former Rocks Pirate. This revelation reshapes the entire series' lore, with fans theorizing about the implications for Luffy's journey. The chapter sold out in Japan within hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: Netflix Announces New Live-Action Series
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals a brand new Death Note live-action series set in the same universe as the 2017 film but with a new cast. The series will explore the first Kira case from the perspective of the task force. Premieres in 2027.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto x Boruto: New Movie Announced for 2027 - 'The Sage of Six Paths'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio Pierrot announces a new Naruto movie featuring both Naruto and Boruto, focusing on the legacy of Hagoromo Otsutsuki. The film will bridge the gap between the end of Naruto Shippuden and Boruto. Teaser poster revealed.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 5: Goku Mini vs Beerus - Power Levels Explained
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest episode of Dragon Ball Daima shocks fans as Mini Goku holds his own against Beerus in a sparring match. Power scaling debates explode online, with some claiming it retcons Super. Episode gets 10/10 on MyAnimeList.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Shibuya Incident Arc Finale Leaks - Gojo Returns?
anime_pulse_items.summary: Major leaks from the Jujutsu Kaisen season 3 finale suggest Gojo's return is imminent, with a post-credits scene showing his eyes opening. Episode airs next week but storyboards have already circulated. Mappa stock rises on hype.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie - Worldwide Box Office Crosses $800M
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle movie continues its record-breaking run, becoming the highest-grossing anime film of 2026. It surpasses 'Demon Slayer: Mugen Train' in Japan and is a global phenomenon. New merchandise line announced.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters - Post-Credits Scene Hints at Sequel
anime_pulse_items.summary: After the final episode aired last month, a post-credits scene shows a boy discovering a titan shard, sparking sequel rumors. Isayama hints at a new project in interview. Fan theories run wild on Reddit.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Deku vs All For One Final Battle - Who Dies?
anime_pulse_items.summary: The penultimate chapter of My Hero Academia sees Deku using a new quirk awakening to defeat All For One, but at a cost: Bakugo sacrifices himself to save Deku. Fans are in mourning. Series ends next month.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Confirmed for July 2026 - New Trailer Shows Makima Return
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA officially announces Chainsaw Man season 2 with a trailer revealing Makima alive and in a new role. The season adapts the International Assassins arc. Preview screenshots show high-quality animation.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: Anya's New Powers Revealed - Telepathic Upgrade
anime_pulse_items.summary: In the Spy x Family season 3 premiere, Anya demonstrates advanced telepathy, reading minds across long distances. The episode gets record ratings on Netflix Japan. New movie announced for December 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren sweeps the Crunchyroll Anime Awards, winning 8 categories including Best Anime, Best Director, and Best Score. Season 2 announcement teased during acceptance speech. Streaming numbers explode on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc - First Look at Ant King
anime_pulse_items.summary: A-1 Pictures releases a teaser for Solo Leveling season 2, showing the Jeju Island raid and the Ant King. Fans compare animation quality to season 1. Premiere date set for June 2026. Manhwa readers hype the arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 50 New Simulcasts for Spring 2026 Including Oshi no Ko S2
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces its largest simulcast lineup ever, including Oshi no Ko season 2, Kaiju No. 8, and Dandadan. Multiple languages available. Subscription numbers expected to rise.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Casts New Straw Hats - Chopper Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix releases casting for One Piece live-action season 2, including Chopper as a CGI character voiced by a famous actor. Filming begins next month. Fans divided on design.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit Anime Community Rallies for 'Attack on Titan' Finale Petition - 1M Signatures
anime_pulse_items.summary: A Change.org petition demanding a re-animated Attack on Titan finale with better CGI reaches 1 million signatures. Fans on r/ShingekiNoKyojin organize a campaign. Studio MAPPA responds positively.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note Musical Coming to Broadway - Original Cast Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: The Death Note musical, originally in Japanese and Korean, gets a Broadway adaptation with a new English script. Cast includes Jeremy Jordan as Light and Eva Noblezada as Misa. Previews start in 2027.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Super Manga Returns After Hiatus - New Arc 'Gods of Destruction'
anime_pulse_items.summary: Toyotaro announces the return of Dragon Ball Super manga with a new arc focusing on the remaining Gods of Destruction. Beerus gets a backstory. First chapter releases next week. Hype builds on social media.
